channel.title: Pages on blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on blog

item.title: About me
item.description:
Alessandro Baffa

Software Engineer, strong advocate of clean code, testing, quality, continuous learning and continuous improvement.

If you are curious to see what I am working on and what I am learning at the moment, check out my projects on Github.

I love to organize learning activities and helping others to improve their skills. I am also good at motivating people. I am a proactive and energetic person.

I am a photography enthusiast –> Flickr. You can also find me on Twitter.

This blog contains my personal thoughts about things that I learn.
